_metadata.description: Controlled vocabulary for the 10 legal_status_enum values in banned_recalled_ingredients.json. Distinct from clinical_risk_vocab — captures the regulatory/legal classification rather than the clinical danger level.
_metadata.purpose: Single source of truth for legal-status labels. Each entry includes the regulatory authority that owns the determination (FDA / DEA / WADA / state).
_metadata.alignment: Pipeline source: scripts/data/banned_recalled_ingredients.json `legal_status_enum` field (146 entries; live: not_lawful_as_supplement=44, high_risk=28, adulterant=24, banned_federal=18, contaminant_risk=16, controlled_substance=7, restricted=5, wada_prohibited=2, banned_state=1, lawful=1).

field_contract.name: User-facing label.
field_contract.authority: Primary regulatory authority. One of: FDA | DEA | WADA | state | EU.

legal_statuses.name: Not lawful as a dietary supplement
legal_statuses.notes: Substance does not meet the FDA definition of a dietary ingredient (DSHEA). Cannot be sold as a supplement, though may exist in other product categories.
legal_statuses.implication: Selling this in a supplement violates federal law. Avoid the product.

legal_statuses.name: Supplement adulterant
legal_statuses.notes: FDA has issued an adulterant determination — products containing this substance are considered adulterated under federal law.
legal_statuses.implication: Subject to FDA enforcement action; product may be seized or recalled.

legal_statuses.name: Banned at federal level
legal_statuses.notes: Substance is explicitly prohibited in dietary supplements by federal regulation or court ruling.
legal_statuses.implication: Sale and possession in supplements is illegal nationwide.

legal_statuses.name: Banned at state level
legal_statuses.notes: Banned in one or more US states (commonly California, Massachusetts, or New York under youth-access or consumer-protection laws).
legal_statuses.implication: Legal status varies by state; check local regulations.

legal_statuses.name: Controlled substance
legal_statuses.notes: Listed under the federal Controlled Substances Act. Possession and sale are restricted; selling in supplements is illegal.
legal_statuses.implication: Federal scheduling; supplement form is not a legal pathway.

legal_statuses.name: WADA prohibited
legal_statuses.notes: Listed on the World Anti-Doping Agency Prohibited List. Banned in competition for elite athletes; some are banned at all times.
legal_statuses.implication: Use will trigger a positive doping test for tested athletes.

legal_statuses.name: Restricted use
legal_statuses.notes: Permitted under specific conditions (dose limits, age restrictions, prescription-only forms). Not freely available as a supplement.
legal_statuses.implication: Read product labels carefully; may require provider oversight.

legal_statuses.name: High-risk substance
legal_statuses.notes: Legal but flagged by FDA, NIH, or international authorities for significant safety concerns. May be subject to future regulation.
legal_statuses.implication: Use only with informed consent and provider awareness.

legal_statuses.name: Contaminant-risk substance
legal_statuses.notes: Substance is associated with frequent contamination of supplement products (heavy metals, pesticides, microbial). Not the substance itself but the supply chain risk.
legal_statuses.implication: Choose certified-tested products; verify third-party COA.

legal_statuses.name: Lawful with monitoring
legal_statuses.notes: Currently lawful as a supplement but under regulatory monitoring. May appear on watchlists or future ban lists.
